High-memory Linux server: first sample.
Uses saturated counters near u64::MAX to exercise wide arithmetic.

cpu  18446744073709551000 0 18446744073709551000 18446744073709551000 18446744073709551000 18446744073709551000 18446744073709551000 18446744073709551000 0 0
intr 12345 0 0 0 0
ctxt 23456789
btime 1716460800
processes 12345
procs_running 1
procs_blocked 0
